select_when: Requirements, stakeholder learning, or technical realities are expected to change while delivery is already underway.
The team can ship in small increments, inspect real feedback quickly, and update the next cycle without waiting for a full-plan reset.
A one-shot plan is creating false certainty, and testing assumptions in sequence is cheaper than betting everything on one forecast.
The work needs explicit hypothesis-driven loops, clear accountability, and a standing one-day answer instead of long planning latency.
avoid_when: External commitments, interfaces, or regulatory gates are fixed enough that agile language would only hide real sequencing and approval constraints.
Agile rituals are replacing learning, accountability, or explicit decision rights with backlog churn and motion theater.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on adaptive delivery, hypothesis-driven loops, and one-day-answer discipline rather than broad software-process branding.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader product-ops sprawl because the raw source is strongest on emergent implementation, short loops, and anti-ritual warnings.
open_questions: The reasoning type compression leans on systems and causal logic even though the source also carries human-centered collaboration language.

select_when.note: The strengths and playbook sections explicitly support change during delivery, short increments, sequence testing, and the one-day-answer heuristic.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions come directly from the danger language about fixed constraints and ritualized backlog churn.

input_type.note: The source activates around adaptive delivery under changing conditions; the typed label is reviewed operational compression.

output_type.note: The playbook yields short-loop delivery and feedback-driven adjustment; the output label compresses that into a reusable operational surface.

reasoning_types.note: The model reasons about interacting loops, constraints, and consequence chains, while the taxonomy labels remain normalized.
